##NAMES=Holdenite
##RRUFFID=R150129
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Mn^2+^_6_Zn_3_(AsO_4_)_2_(SiO_4_)(OH)_8_
##LOCALITY=Sterling Hill, Ogdensburg, Franklin Mining District, Sussex County, New Jersey, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Marcus Origlieri
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregates of highly irregular pinkish microcrystals, associated with franklinite, willemite, pyrochroite, zincite, and rhodochrosite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R150129
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 12.008 b: 31.543 c: 8.6989 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 3294.8 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
